_README: EDITABLE TEXT — ABOUT PAGE. Change only the text INSIDE the quotes on the right of each colon (:). Do NOT change the labels on the left, and keep every quote ("), comma (,) and curly brace ({ }) exactly where it is. Save the file and the website updates automatically. If a page looks broken after an edit, you probably deleted a quote or comma — undo the change.

meta.title: About Us | Western Sydney's OC & Selective Tutors
meta.description: Meet Success at School — specialist OC, NAPLAN and Selective tutors serving Plumpton, Hassall Grove and Quakers Hill. Our mission, approach and proven student results.

pageHeader.title: About Success at School
pageHeader.description: We exist to help students launch ahead — academically, confidently, and with a genuine love for learning. Here is our story.

story.title: Built from a Belief That Every Student Can Excel
story.subtitle: Success at School was founded in 2003 by Lisa Duong, a classroom teacher who saw too many bright students fall through the cracks.
story.paragraph1: Lisa noticed that the students who thrived were not necessarily the most naturally gifted — they were the ones who had learned how to learn. They had strategies, they had confidence, and they had someone who believed in their potential.
story.paragraph2: That insight became the foundation of Success at School. We built a tutoring model that combines academic rigour with genuine mentorship, small-group dynamics with personalised attention, and proven methodology with innovative teaching.
story.paragraph3: Over a decade later, we have helped thousands of students achieve outcomes they once thought impossible — selective school placements, top-band NAPLAN results, HSC scores that open doors, and most importantly, a belief in their own ability.
story.quote: Every student deserves to know what it feels like to be truly capable. Our job is not just to teach — it is to unlock that realisation.

mission.title: To Accelerate Every Student's Potential
mission.subtitle: We are on a mission to transform the way students experience academic support — from something they need to something they want.
mission.value1Description: We hold students to high standards because we know they can rise to meet them. Every lesson is designed to stretch thinking and deepen understanding.
mission.value2Description: We invest in every student as an individual. Their confidence, wellbeing, and love of learning matter as much as their test scores.
mission.value3Description: Everything we do is measured against one question: is this helping our students launch ahead? If not, we change it.
mission.value4Description: We believe education is a team effort. Regular communication, detailed progress reports, and open dialogue keep families fully in the loop.

stats.title: Our Impact
stats.subtitle: The numbers tell a story of consistent, life-changing outcomes.

team.title: The People Behind the Results
team.subtitle: Our tutors are more than teachers — they are mentors, motivators, and masters of their craft.
team.fullTeamNote: Our full team includes 50+ subject-specialist tutors across all key learning areas.

approach.title: How We Help Students Launch Ahead
approach.subtitle: Our methodology is built on three pillars: diagnostic precision, expert instruction, and continuous feedback.
approach.step1Description: We never guess. Every student starts with a comprehensive assessment that identifies strengths, gaps, and learning style. This becomes the blueprint for their journey.
approach.step2Description: Every lesson is intentional, structured, and engaging. Our tutors bring deep subject knowledge and a genuine passion for teaching that inspires students to do their best.
approach.step3Description: Progress is tracked weekly, with detailed reports sent to families. We adapt our approach based on data, ensuring every minute of tuition delivers maximum impact.
approach.difference1Description: Every lesson is informed by the latest cognitive science and syllabus requirements.
approach.difference2Description: Small classes ensure every child gets the attention they deserve.
approach.difference3Description: We build confidence, resilience, and a growth mindset alongside academic skills.
approach.difference4Description: Weekly updates, parent portals, and open communication keep everyone aligned.

finalCta.title: Ready to Join the Success at School Community?
finalCta.subtitle: Whether you are exploring options or ready to enrol, we would love to meet you and your child.
